differential_diagnoses: Portal hypertension with ectopic jejunal variceal bleeding
Occult small bowel neoplasm or vascular malformation
next_steps: Interventional radiology consultation for formal angiography of the celiac and mesenteric arteries to evaluate for pseudoaneurysm or arteriovenous fistula
Balloon-assisted enteroscopy to examine the hepaticojejunostomy site for active bleeding or biliary-enteric fistula
Portal vein venography and pressure measurement to define anatomy of the portal stenosis and portal biliopathy
Liver biopsy of the perihilar region to rule out malignancy given the abnormal enhancement on MRCP
Multidisciplinary review by interventional radiology, hepatobiliary surgery, and interventional gastroenterology
